name: Bluetti AC180
description: Bluetti AC180 packs 1,152Wh with 1,800W output at an aggressive price point. The best performance-per-dollar in the mid-size category.
longDescription: Bluetti AC180 is our best value mid-size power station. Bluetti AC180 packs 1,152Wh with 1,800W output at an aggressive price point. The best performance-per-dollar in the mid-size category. After extensive hands-on testing, we found it delivers on its promises with great value at $799 for 1,152wh.
verdict: Bluetti AC180 is a solid choice for value mid-size power station. Great value at $799 for 1,152Wh.

faqs.question: Who is Bluetti AC180 best for?
faqs.answer: Bluetti AC180 packs 1,152Wh with 1,800W output at an aggressive price point. The best performance-per-dollar in the mid-size category.

faqs.question: Is Bluetti AC180 worth it?
faqs.answer: Yes — great value at $799 for 1,152wh. Slower solar charging than EcoFlow is the main trade-off.
